allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "E:\\dev\\Portfolio\\AstroPortfolio\\node_modules\\vite" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name; $vitePkg = Get-Content "E:\\dev\\Portfolio\\AstroPortfolio\\node_modules\\vite\\package.json" -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($vitePkg\) { Write-Host "Top-level vite: $\($vitePkg.version\)" }; Write-Host "---"; $astroPkg = Get-Content "E:\\dev\\Portfolio\\AstroPortfolio\\node_modules\\astro\\package.json" -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Host "astro: $\($astroPkg.version\)"; Write-Host "astro dep vite: $\($astroPkg.dependencies.vite\)"; Write-Host "---"; $reactPkg = Get-Content "E:\\dev\\Portfolio\\AstroPortfolio\\node_modules\\@astrojs\\react\\package.json" -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Host "@astrojs/react: $\($reactPkg.version\)"; Write-Host "@astrojs/react dep vite: $\($reactPkg.dependencies.vite\)")

PowerShell(Get-NetIPAddress -AddressFamily IPv4 | Where-Object { $_.InterfaceAlias -notmatch "Loopback|vEthernet|Hyper-V" -and $_.IPAddress -ne "127.0.0.1" } | Select-Object IPAddress, InterfaceAlias)

PowerShell($content = Get-Content "E:\\dev\\Portfolio\\public\\bulldog-2.html" -Raw; $idx = $content.IndexOf\("vec2 eyeWarp"\); $sub = $content.Substring\($idx, 600\); $bytes = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes\($sub\); for \($i = 0; $i -lt [Math]::Min\(50, $bytes.Length\); $i++\) { Write-Host \("{0:X2}" -f $bytes[$i]\) -NoNewline; if \(\($i+1\) % 16 -eq 0\) { Write-Host "" } }; Write-Host ""; Write-Host "---"; Write-Host $sub.Substring\(0, 450\))

PowerShell(Get-Content "E:\\dev\\Portfolio\\public\\bulldog.html" -Encoding UTF8 | Select-Object -Index 544,545,546,547,548,549 | ForEach-Object { [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes\($_\) | ForEach-Object { Write-Host -NoNewline "$_ " }; Write-Host "" })
